)

rna_precipitation_hold = cool_sample(
    sample=rna_precipitation_mix,
    temperature_c=-20,
    duration_min=120,
    device="freezer"
)

rna_pellet_spin = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=rna_precipitation_hold,
    speed_xg=12000,
    duration_min=10,
    temperature_c=4
)

rna_pellet_wash = mix_sample(
    sample=rna_pellet_spin + " + 70% ethanol",
    method="inversion",
    duration_s=10,
    speed="gentle"
)

rna_pellet_recover = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=rna_pellet_wash,
    speed_xg=12000,
    duration_min=10,
    temperature_c=4
)

rna_pellet_dry = dry_sample(
    sample=rna_pellet_recover,
    method="air dry",
    temperature_c=22,
    duration_min=10
)

final_sgrna = mix_sample(
    sample=rna_pellet_dry + " + 10 uL rnase_free_water",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=20,
    speed="gentle"
)

uv260_measurement = measure_signal(
    sample=final_sgrna,
    assay="UV absorbance",
    wavelength_nm=260,
    replicate_n=3
)

concentration_record = record_measurement(
    sample=uv260_measurement,
    metric="RNA concentration",
    unit="ng/uL",
    note="Final sgRNA concentration measured by 260 nm UV-style assay after recovery in 10 uL rnase_free_water."
)

integrity_record = record_measurement(
    sample=final_sgrna,
    metric="RNA integrity",
    unit="observation",
    note="10% urea-PAGE QC recorded for final sgRNA; integrity observation documented for later Cas9 testing."
)

    sample=ip_pellet_spin,
    method="inversion",
    duration_s=10,
    speed="gentle",
)
wce_wash1_mix = mix_sample(
    sample=wce_pellet_spin,
    method="inversion",
    duration_s=10,
    speed="gentle",
)

)

)
wce_brief_dry = dry_sample(
    sample=wce_wash2_spin,

    temperature_c=21,

)

# Low-temperature dissolution and final resuspension-style mixing

    sample=ip_brief_dry,
    temperature_c=4,
    duration_min=1020,
    condition="static",
)
wce_dissolution = incubate_sample(

    temperature_c=4,
    duration_min=1020,

)

ip_dissolved_dna = mix_sample(

    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=15,
    speed="gentle",
)
wce_dissolved_dna = mix_sample(
    sample=wce_dissolution,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=15,
    speed="gentle",
)

    speed="gentle",
)

# Permeabilization-associated wash at 400 x g
cells_perm_wash_spin = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=cells_in_perm_buffer,
    speed_xg=400,
    duration_min=5.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Intracellular staining in permeabilization buffer, protected from light
cells_with_intracellular_stain = mix_sample(
    sample=f"{cells_perm_wash_spin} + intracellular_stain_mix",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=20.0,
    speed="gentle",
)
cells_intracellular_stained = incubate_sample(
    sample=cells_with_intracellular_stain,
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=60.0,
    condition="protected from light",
)

# Wash stained cells in permeabilization buffer before final resuspension
cells_post_ic_spin = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=cells_intracellular_stained,
    speed_xg=300,
    duration_min=5.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)
cells_perm_washed_final = mix_sample(
    sample=f"{cells_post_ic_spin} + perm_buffer",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=20.0,
    speed="gentle",
)
cells_post_final_perm_spin = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=cells_perm_washed_final,
    speed_xg=300,
    duration_min=5.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Final resuspension in FACS Buffer-II, ready for acquisition
cells_ready_for_acquisition = mix_sample(
    sample=f"{cells_post_final_perm_spin} + facs_buffer_II",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=20.0,
    speed="gentle",
)

)

native_barcode_ligation = incubate_sample(

    temperature_c=22.0,
    duration_min=20.0,
    condition="static",
)

post_exchange_cold = cool_sample(
    sample="rhoA_exchange_mix",
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=5.0,
    device="refrigerator",
)

bead_pellet_spin = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=post_exchange_cold,
    speed_xg=6000,
    duration_min=2.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

exchanged_supernatant = collect_fraction(
    sample=bead_pellet_spin,
    phase="supernatant",
    destination="cold_recovery_tube",
    volume_ul=1000.0,
)

bead_wash_incubation = incubate_sample(
    sample="bead_pellet_from_rhoA_exchange_mix + 0.5 mL tris_wash_buffer",
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=2.0,
    condition="static",
)

bead_wash_spin = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=bead_wash_incubation,
    speed_xg=6000,
    duration_min=2.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

wash_supernatant = collect_fraction(
    sample=bead_wash_spin,
    phase="supernatant",
    destination="cold_wash_recovery_tube",
    volume_ul=500.0,
)

combined_recovered_rhoa = collect_fraction(
    sample="combined: cold_recovery_tube + cold_wash_recovery_tube",
    phase="pooled_liquid",
    destination="amicon_10k_device",
    volume_ul=1500.0,
)

cold_loaded_amicon = cool_sample(
    sample=combined_recovered_rhoa,
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=5.0,
    device="refrigerator",
)

concentrated_rhoa = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=cold_loaded_amicon,
    speed_xg=6000,
    duration_min=20.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

final_concentrate = collect_fraction(
    sample=concentrated_rhoa,
    phase="retentate",
    destination="final_gmppnp_or_gtpgs_bound_rhoA_tube",
    volume_ul=1000.0,
)

cold_final_concentrate = cool_sample(
    sample=final_concentrate,
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=5.0,
    device="refrigerator",
)

bradford_readout = measure_signal(
    sample="bradford_reagent_mix + aliquot of final_gmppnp_or_gtpgs_bound_rhoA_tube",
    assay="Bradford",
    wavelength_nm=595,
    replicate_n=3,
)

recorded_concentration = record_measurement(
    sample=bradford_readout,
    metric="RhoA concentration",
    unit="mg/mL",
    note="Derived from Bradford readout for GMPPNP- or GTPγS-bound RhoA after 4 C reconcentration to ~1 mL.",
)

recorded_final_state = record_measurement(
    sample=cold_final_concentrate,
    metric="sample identity",
    unit="state",

)

pre_freeze_aliquots = collect_fraction(

    destination="aliquot_tubes",
    volume_ul=1000.0,
)

frozen_aliquots = cool_sample(
    sample=pre_freeze_aliquots,
    temperature_c=-80.0,
    duration_min=60.0,
    device="freezer",
)

stored_final_preparation = store_sample(
    sample=frozen_aliquots,
    temperature_c=-80.0,
    duration_h=8760.0,
    container="aliquot_tubes",
)

    duration_s=15,
    speed="gentle"
)

column_load_filtered = filter_sample(
    sample=depletion_resuspended,
    filter_type="cell_strainer_40um",
    pore_size_um=40,
    destination="15 mL conical context through ms_column_setup"
)

column_negative_flowthrough = magnetic_separate(
    sample=column_load_filtered,
    rack="ms_column_setup",
    duration_min=1,
    collect_phase="flow-through unlabeled fraction"
)

column_wash_1 = magnetic_separate(
    sample="ms_column_setup washed with 0.5 mL macs_buffer into negative fraction collection",
    rack="ms_column_setup",
    duration_min=1,
    collect_phase="flow-through unlabeled fraction"
)

column_wash_2 = magnetic_separate(
    sample="ms_column_setup washed with 0.5 mL macs_buffer into negative fraction collection",
    rack="ms_column_setup",
    duration_min=1,
    collect_phase="flow-through unlabeled fraction"
)

column_wash_3 = magnetic_separate(
    sample="ms_column_setup washed with 0.5 mL macs_buffer into negative fraction collection",
    rack="ms_column_setup",
    duration_min=1,
    collect_phase="flow-through unlabeled fraction"
)

negative_fraction_pooled = mix_sample(
    sample="column_negative_flowthrough + column_wash_1 + column_wash_2 + column_wash_3",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=10,
    speed="gentle"
)

negative_fraction_spun = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=negative_fraction_pooled,
    speed_xg=250,
    duration_min=5,
    temperature_c=4
)

cd31_label_mix = mix_sample(
    sample="pellet from negative_fraction_spun + 90 uL macs_buffer + 10 uL cd31_beads",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=10,
    speed="gentle"
)

cd31_labeled = incubate_sample(
    sample=cd31_label_mix,
    temperature_c=4,
    duration_min=15,
    condition="static"
)

cd31_wash_added = mix_sample(
    sample="cd31_labeled + 3 mL macs_buffer",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=10,
    speed="gentle"
)

cd31_wash_spun = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=cd31_wash_added,
    speed_xg=250,
    duration_min=5,
    temperature_c=4
)

final_cd31_ready_fraction = mix_sample(
    sample="pellet from cd31_wash_spun + 0.5 mL macs_buffer",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=15,
    speed="gentle"
)

    duration_s=30.0,

)

    volume_ul=100.0,
    aliquot_count=1
)
cond2_plate_round1 = aliquot_sample(
    sample=cond2_eq1,
    destination="plate_96well",
    volume_ul=100.0,
    aliquot_count=1
)

plate_read1 = measure_signal(
    sample="plate_96well",
    assay="absorbance",
    wavelength_nm=550,
    replicate_n=3
)

plate_read1_record = record_measurement(
    sample=plate_read1,
    metric="A550_round1",
    unit="AU",
    note="First absorbance read for three CHAPS titration conditions"
)

# Return each aliquot from the plate to its corresponding source condition
cond0_restored = transfer_liquid(
    source=cond0_plate_round1,
    destination=cond0_eq1,
    volume_ul=100.0,
    tool="pipette"
)
cond1_restored = transfer_liquid(
    source=cond1_plate_round1,
    destination=cond1_eq1,
    volume_ul=100.0,
    tool="pipette"
)
cond2_restored = transfer_liquid(
    source=cond2_plate_round1,
    destination=cond2_eq1,
    volume_ul=100.0,
    tool="pipette"
)

# Round 2: add second CHAPS challenge
cond0_challenge = add_reagent(
    sample=cond0_restored,
    reagent="chaps_0_5M",
    volume_ul=3.0,
    mixing="gentle"
)
cond1_challenge = add_reagent(
    sample=cond1_restored,
    reagent="chaps_0_5M",
    volume_ul=3.0,
    mixing="gentle"
)
cond2_challenge = add_reagent(
    sample=cond2_restored,
    reagent="chaps_0_5M",
    volume_ul=3.0,
    mixing="gentle"
)

# Second equilibration at room temperature with gentle mixing
cond0_eq2 = set_thermal_mixer(
    sample=cond0_challenge,
    temperature_c=25.0,
    speed_rpm=30,
    duration_min=25.0
)
cond1_eq2 = set_thermal_mixer(
    sample=cond1_challenge,
    temperature_c=25.0,
    speed_rpm=30,
    duration_min=25.0
)
cond2_eq2 = set_thermal_mixer(
    sample=cond2_challenge,
    temperature_c=25.0,
    speed_rpm=30,
    duration_min=25.0
)

# Transfer 100 uL from each challenged condition to the 96-well plate for final absorbance read
cond0_plate_round2 = aliquot_sample(
    sample=cond0_eq2,
    destination="plate_96well",
    volume_ul=100.0,
    aliquot_count=1
)
cond1_plate_round2 = aliquot_sample(
    sample=cond1_eq2,
    destination="plate_96well",
    volume_ul=100.0,
    aliquot_count=1
)
cond2_plate_round2 = aliquot_sample(
    sample=cond2_eq2,
    destination="plate_96well",
    volume_ul=100.0,
    aliquot_count=1
)

plate_read2 = measure_signal(
    sample="plate_96well",
    assay="absorbance",
    wavelength_nm=550,
    replicate_n=3
)

plate_read2_record = record_measurement(
    sample=plate_read2,
    metric="A550_round2",
    unit="AU",
    note="Final absorbance read after second 3.0 uL CHAPS challenge for three matched titration conditions"
)

)

ready_for_loading = filter_sample(
